source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for bright collaborative product UI with Noto Sans guidance for Japanese labels, compact activity streams, and clear social dashboards.
layout: Tight 8px grids, feather-bar panels, black-and-white stripe dividers, compact social feeds, approachable cards, and bright dashboard rhythm.

prompts.label: Transparent Goldfinch feather motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Goldfinch transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated goldfinch feather motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A single elegant American goldfinch wing feather with bright lemon-yellow vane, deep black wing markings, clean white bars and edge flecks, subtle thistle-green reflected undertones, accurate feather shaft, barbs, and fine natural texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete feather cutout with generous padding; diagonal presentation, full tip and quill visible, no cropping.
Lighting/mood: crisp clean studio light that preserves yellow, black, white, and fine feather detail; bright social product-system energy.
Chroma-key background: place the feather on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for transparency removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject, no bird body, no flowers, no landscape, no extra feathers, no text, no watermark, no props, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Goldfinch light-mode design-system board, 16:9, high-resolution source asset
Primary request: Create one wide comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Goldfinch" / "Goldfinch Feather", source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn theme.
System feel: bright social system for collaborative product UI, friendly but precise, lively scanning rhythm.
Palette: goldfinch yellow #f3d21b, wing black #17160f, clean feather white #fffbe8, thistle green #6f8f57, seedhead olive #a7b46a, warm meadow paper #fbf6da, pale straw #eee5aa, soft gray-green #d7dcc1, dark quill charcoal #2a2920.
Layout/content: 3840x2160-style 16:9 board with large readable labels. Include palette, typography, multilingual English and Japanese guidance, buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, tables, command/search, navigation, social activity feed, member avatars, dashboard charts, empty/error/loading states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture, and icon style.
Visual language: feather-bar panels, black-and-white wing stripe dividers, yellow active states, thistle-green secondary actions, seedhead olive charts, white feather highlights, tight 8px grid, 8px radii, clean social collaboration surfaces.
Text constraints: Use clear short UI labels only; keep all text large and legible, no tiny unreadable token tables, no random brand names.
Exclude: no purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no full bird as main subject, no photoreal landscape, no flowers as main subject, no misspellings, no watermark.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Goldfinch dark-mode design-system board, 16:9, high-resolution source asset
Primary request: Create one wide comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Goldfinch" / "Goldfinch Feather", translated from the same light design-system language.
System feel: bright social system in dark mode, lively collaborative UI, high contrast without neon glare.
Palette: dark quill charcoal #17160f and #232218 backgrounds, feather white #fffbe8 foreground, goldfinch yellow #f3d21b active states, thistle green #6f8f57 secondary actions, seedhead olive #a7b46a charts, muted thistle surface #31382a, pale straw outlines #eee5aa, warm meadow paper tint #fbf6da used sparingly.
Layout/content: 3840x2160-style 16:9 board with large readable labels. Include palette, typography, multilingual English and Japanese guidance, buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, tables, command/search, navigation, social activity feed, member avatars, dashboard charts, empty/error/loading states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture, and icon style.
Visual language: feather-bar panels, black-and-white wing stripe dividers, yellow active states, thistle-green support controls, seedhead olive data marks, white feather highlights, dark feather texture, tight 8px grid, 8px radii, clean social collaboration surfaces.
Text constraints: Use clear short UI labels only; keep all text large and legible, no tiny unreadable token tables, no random brand names.
Exclude: no purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no full bird as main subject, no photoreal landscape, no flowers as main subject, no neon rainbow, no misspellings, no watermark.
